problem_solved: Hospitals need to safely monitor and care for patients outside traditional hospital settings, reducing bed occupancy and enabling earlier discharge while maintaining clinical oversight
who_buys_it: NHS trusts, European hospitals, healthcare systems seeking to implement virtual ward programs
key_features: Virtual ward platform with remote patient monitoring, clinical dashboards, integration with medical devices, automated vital sign collection, deterioration alerts, care pathway management
business_model: B2B SaaS platform licensing to healthcare providers with per-patient or per-bed subscription pricing
why_varden_should_care: Leading European virtual ward platform with NHS contracts; positioned to benefit from post-pandemic acceleration of hospital-at-home programs across UK and EU markets

company_name: Current Health (acquired by Best Buy Health)
problem_solved: Hospitals need continuous remote monitoring of patients at home with medical-grade devices and clinical oversight to safely deliver hospital-level care outside traditional facilities
who_buys_it: Health systems, hospitals, health insurers seeking to implement hospital-at-home programs and reduce costly inpatient stays
key_features: FDA-cleared wearable monitoring device, continuous vital sign tracking (SpO2, pulse, temperature, respiration, movement), clinical command center, AI-powered deterioration detection, care team alerts, EHR integration
business_model: B2B platform-as-a-service with hardware leasing and software subscription; now integrated into Best Buy Health's care delivery services
why_varden_should_care: Pioneer in hospital-at-home technology with both US and EU footprint; acquisition by Best Buy validates market opportunity and provides scale for European expansion

problem_solved: Healthcare systems need scalable digital infrastructure to deliver hospital-at-home care, clinical trials, and chronic disease management with remote patient monitoring
who_buys_it: Health systems, pharmaceutical companies, research institutions, governments seeking digital health platforms for care delivery and decentralized clinical trials
key_features: Modular digital health platform, remote patient monitoring apps, clinical dashboard, biomarker integration, decentralized clinical trial platform, hospital-at-home care pathways, multi-therapeutic area support
business_model: B2B SaaS platform licensing to healthcare providers and pharma; project-based contracts for clinical trials; revenue sharing models
why_varden_should_care: Leading European digital therapeutics and RPM platform with major pharma partnerships and NHS deployments; strong position in emerging decentralized care market

problem_solved: Hospitals and healthcare providers need to scale virtual ward programs with user-friendly remote monitoring that reduces hospital admissions and supports home-based recovery
who_buys_it: European hospitals, regional healthcare systems, disease management programs, home care organizations
key_features: Virtual ward platform, patient-facing mobile app, clinical monitoring dashboard, video consultations, validated medical questionnaires, integration with hospital IT systems, multi-language support for European markets
business_model: B2B SaaS subscription licensing to healthcare organizations with implementation services
why_varden_should_care: Dutch market leader in virtual wards with expansion across European markets; strong focus on usability and clinical validation positions well for pan-European growth

problem_solved: Hospitals need wireless, continuous patient monitoring that works across wards, critical care, and home settings to improve patient safety and enable early discharge
who_buys_it: Hospitals, healthcare systems, home care providers seeking wireless patient monitoring infrastructure for general wards and virtual wards
key_features: Patient Status Engine (FDA-cleared Class II device), wireless vital sign monitoring, cardiac monitoring, respiratory monitoring, early warning scores, AI-powered predictive analytics, newborn and adult monitoring, continuous data capture
business_model: B2B hardware and software platform sales with recurring software subscription; device-as-a-service models
why_varden_should_care: Unique FDA-cleared wireless monitoring platform enabling hospital-to-home continuity; proven reduction in ICU readmissions and nursing workload; positioned for virtual ward infrastructure build-out

problem_solved: European healthcare systems need integrated digital-first care delivery that spans primary care, specialist consultations, and care coordination for patients at home
who_buys_it: Health insurers, regional healthcare systems, governments seeking digital care delivery and telehealth services at scale
key_features: Europe's largest digital-first healthcare provider, 34+ physical clinics, 24/7 video consultations, chronic disease management, care coordination, prescription services, mental health support, multi-country platform
business_model: B2B contracts with insurers and regional healthcare systems; capitated care models; direct-to-consumer services
why_varden_should_care: Market-leading European digital care platform with integrated physical-digital care delivery; strong foundation for hospital-at-home care coordination services

problem_solved: Swiss and European healthcare systems need 24/7 telemedicine and care coordination services to reduce emergency department burden and support patients at home
who_buys_it: Swiss health insurers, regional healthcare systems, employers seeking telemedicine and digital health services
key_features: 24/7 telemedicine platform, Medgate app, emergency triage services, Kids Line for pediatric care, 34 clinics across Switzerland, care coordination, prescription services, specialist referral network, 3,800+ partner providers
business_model: B2B contracts with health insurers; fee-for-service reimbursement via Swiss health insurance system; partnership models with pharmacies
why_varden_should_care: Swiss market leader in telemedicine with proven model for integrating digital and physical care; demonstrates sustainable telemedicine economics in European health system

problem_solved: Health systems need enterprise-grade hospital-at-home solutions integrated with existing monitoring infrastructure, clinical workflows, and IT systems for scalable care delivery
who_buys_it: Large health systems, academic medical centers, integrated delivery networks seeking comprehensive hospital-at-home programs
key_features: Integrated patient monitoring platform, connected medical devices, clinical decision support, care coordination tools, EHR integration, post-discharge monitoring, chronic disease management, enterprise-scale deployment
business_model: B2B enterprise platform licensing with hardware, software, and services; long-term contracts with health systems
why_varden_should_care: Global healthcare IT leader with established European hospital relationships; infrastructure for hospital-at-home integrated with existing Philips monitoring and IT deployments across EU
